---
id: active-open-questions
title: Active with open questions
status: active
version: 1
---

## Intent
This spec is marked `status: active` but still has open questions. The
parser must refuse this combination because unresolved meaning cannot drive
code generation — the Tractarian principle in action.

## Behavior
- It does a thing.

## Examples
```example name="thing"
Given a thing
When it runs
Then it works
```

## Invariants
- {deterministic} Active + open questions is rejected.

## Open questions
- Should we even ship this?
